title: Sacred Council (Sagrado Consejo)
description: A tribute to a culture that captured our hearts on our first trip together. Tribal, ancient, psychedelic, and modern. All of it deliberately mine.
longDescription: My wife and I collect masks when we travel. Not souvenirs. Actual art, made by local artists, carrying the spirit of the place they came from. Our first mask came from Mexico, from a honeymoon trip to Riviera Maya that turned into a love affair with a culture we kept returning to year after year. Sacred Council is my appreciation of Mexico and our experiences there. A piece built in my own style but rooted in the iconography, the color, the layered mythology of the Mayan world. I wanted to show respect by truly putting some of myself into it, and not just copying the culture's style. For the full story, see the blog post.
